In this verse the sage prescribes a method to find out which of the
kings could be attacked and vanquished.]
Next the author speaks of the effects of the Moon's contact
with the constellation Rohini.
I^nt 5T5ft qfq \
mm w^a
Should the Moon situated to the south of the star, whether
far or near, conjoin with Rohini, there would result terrible disaster
to the world.
[The metre is T*TtoTT-]

When the Moon touches Rohini while standing in the south,
and then moves to the north, there will be good rains accompanied
